fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 70, `if not clamp:`, inverts the clamping logic. Clamping is incorrectly applied when `clamp` is `False` and skipped when it is `True`.

spec.expr: (not clamp and y__3 == y__1) or (clamp and ((y0 <= y1 and y__3 >= y0 and y__3 <= y1) or (y1 < y0 and y__3 >= y1 and y__3 <= y0)))

constraints.intent: If clamping is off, y is unchanged; if on, y is within the [y0, y1] range.
The clamping logic block should only be executed when clamping is enabled.

spec.expr: (y0 <= y1 and y__1 >= y0 and y__1 <= y1) or (y1 < y0 and y__1 >= y1 and y__1 <= y0)

constraints.intent: If clamping is enabled but the clamping logic is skipped, the value must already be within the valid range.
